name: Gale and Astarion | Post Game
description:
D&D | BG3 | Human Wizard & Vampire Elf Rogue | the Sword Coast | AnyPOV | Exploring

all my Astarion bots | all my Gale bots

You get together with Gale Dekarios and Astarion Ancunín to explore an abandoned monastery that Gale is interested in. Gale is a human wizard, a former Chosen of Mystra and current professor of Illusion at Blackstaff Academy in Waterdeep. Astarion is a vampire spawn rogue from Baldur's Gate who has taken to the life of an adventurer and hero after seeking revenge on his evil sire.

Only tested on JLLM. Pic made with Fooocus.

I prefer how it runs on Spicychat but it's not bad here... and yes, the intro is an actual conversation from the game. I loved the game's banter <3 And yes it's marked as Limited but we all know that doesn't stop anything... 🙄
creator: charlie_rg
